xfail.signature-external-dsa: the Reference is an EXTERNAL resource (http://www.w3.org/TR/xml-stylesheet); xmldsig1 is fail-closed and does not dereference external references (ErrReferenceNotFound: unsupported reference URI)
xfail.signature-external-b64-dsa: the Reference is an EXTERNAL resource (xml-stylesheet.b64); xmldsig1 fail-closes on external references
xfail.signature-x509-crt: the Reference is an EXTERNAL resource (xml-stylesheet); xmldsig1 fail-closes on external references. The inline X509Certificate resolves the key fine, so the external reference is the sole blocker
xfail.signature-x509-crt-crl: the Reference is an EXTERNAL resource (xml-stylesheet); xmldsig1 fail-closes on external references. The signing cert resolves; the X509CRL revocation is a trust-layer concern helium does not evaluate
xfail.signature-x509-sn: the Reference is an EXTERNAL resource (xml-stylesheet); xmldsig1 fail-closes on external references. The X509SubjectName resolves the cert via harness decoded-DName match, so the external reference is the sole blocker
xfail.signature-x509-is: the Reference is an EXTERNAL resource (xml-stylesheet); xmldsig1 fail-closes on external references. The X509IssuerSerial resolves the cert (harness match by serial), so the external reference is the sole blocker
xfail.signature-keyname: ds:KeyName is not parsed by helium, so no key is surfaced to the KeySource; the Reference is also an external resource that xmldsig1 fail-closes on
xfail.signature-x509-ski: ds:X509SKI (SubjectKeyIdentifier) is not parsed by helium, so no key is surfaced to the KeySource; the Reference is also an external resource that xmldsig1 fail-closes on
xfail.signature-retrievalmethod-rawx509crt: ds:RetrievalMethod is not parsed by helium, so no key is surfaced to the KeySource; the Reference is also an external resource that xmldsig1 fail-closes on
xfail.signature: the large composite signature: KeyInfo supplies the key via ds:RetrievalMethod (not parsed by helium) and its References require base64, XPointer, XSLT, here() XPath, Manifest, and external-resource support that xmldsig1 does not implement
